title: U.S. gave Tehran details on Iranian asylum seekers, lawsuit alleges
summary_full: The claim, outlined in court papers, contends information shared with Iran could jeopardize the lives of pro-democracy protesters, religious minorities and LGTBQ people.
summary_public: The claim, outlined in court papers, contends information shared with Iran could jeopardize the lives of pro-democracy protesters, religious minorities and LGTBQ people.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: information shared with Iran could jeopardize the lives of pro-democracy protesters
